<!-- Thanks for contributing to RAK OS 👑 -->

## What & why

Briefly: what this changes and the problem it solves.

## Type

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Skill / docs
- [ ] Spec / profile (needs an RFC + Crown ratification — link it)
- [ ] Client / manifest
- [ ] CI / community

## Checklist

- [ ] Focused and minimal (one concern).
- [ ] `node scripts/check-skills.mjs` passes locally.
- [ ] `node scripts/check-honesty.mjs` passes locally.
- [ ] New/edited skill cards keep the `# SKILL:` format and document only real tools.
- [ ] No absolute security claims, no internal references in public docs.
- [ ] Versions stay in sync (`package.json` / `server.json` / `claude-plugin.json`) if touched.

## RFC (substantive changes only)

Link the RFC in `docs/rfcs/` for any change to the spec, protocol surface, economics, or governance.
